response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform leadership at scale, or the 15-year technical depth required for a director-level AI strategy role; his career gap and inconsistent focus on AI/cloud limit his fit.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No demonstrable AI/ML product or platform built with deep technical ownership
Career gap since Oct 2025 raises red flags for continuity and current relevance
Lacks clear evidence of cloud AI strategy leadership or customer advisory experience
